sentences.translation: Novi zaposlenik je došao u firmu.
sentences.translationEn: A new employee came to the company.

sentences.translation: Direktor ga je predstavio ostatku tima.
sentences.translationEn: The manager introduced him to the rest of the team.

sentences.translation: Svi su ga dočekali i rukovali se s njim.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone welcomed him and shook his hand.
